info.name: File Drop Batch
info.summary: Bulk-create file drop folders and links from a CSV of presenters
info.description: Upload a CSV of Theatre/Date/Start Time/Presenter Name/Presenter Email rows to create a nested folder per row, an upload-only "file drop" public share link for each folder (with a single expiry date/time applied to the whole batch), email each presenter their link, and download a copy of the CSV with the file drop link added. Optionally also creates shared root folders (Holding slides, fonts, schedules, all show, plus custom names) and a Nextcloud account per distinct theatre, scoped to its own theatre folder and the shared root folders. Can also automatically mirror the whole base folder to a separate Nextcloud instance via rclone over WebDAV once a batch's file-drop links have expired, for replicating collected files to a server taken to the event site. Every session (from a CSV or added manually) is tracked in a Sessions list where it can be edited, closed early, or removed.
info.author: Allan Sargeant
